map_coverage: {done} ya {total} madoroba lama kambisisiweke ku fikela sweswi - lama seleke ya engeteriwa siku na siku.
cur_so_far: {year} kufikela sweswi (kufika eka {day} {month}): {v} °C hi xiringaniso, {d} °C vs 1961-1990 mean ya masiku lawa ya fanaka ya lembe.
cmp_hint: Curve yin’wana na yin’wana i anomaly ya lembe na lembe ya doroba rero vs baseline ya yona ya 1961-1990, hikokwalaho tindzhawu letingana maxelo yohambana hambana ti pimanisa kahle.
kpi_rate: Mpimo wa ku hisa ka misava
kpi_since: Ku hisa ka misava ku sukela hi 1940
kpi_warmest: Lembe ro kufumela swinene (xiringaniso xa misava).
sum_season: Nkarhi wo kufumela hiku hatlisa swinene laha: {season} ({v} °C hi khume ra malembe).
sum_month: Nhweti leyi kufumelaka hiku hatlisa laha: {month} ({v} °C hi khume ra malembe).
grid_alias_note: Rhekhodo ya mahiselo yi hlayeriwa hi ~11 km climate-data grid cell. {alias} yi avelana sele ya yona na {city}, kutani havumbirhi bya tona ti kombisa matimu lama fanaka ya 1940-sweswi.
qv_nodata: Ku hava data ya doroba leri ku fikela sweswi.
qv_nearest: Doroba ra le kusuhi leri kambisisiweke
guide_title: ℹ️ Ndlela yo hlaya tichati leti
guide_body:
• Tidoti / tibara: nkoka wa lembe rin’wana na rin’wana.
  • Curve ya mihlovo yo tiya: a LOESS smoother: mukhuva wa laha kaya, lowu ntshunxekeke ku gombonyoka, leswaku u kota ku vona ku cinca ka mpimo hi ku famba ka nkarhi (e.g. ku kufumela ku hatlisa endzhaku ~1985).
  • Layini leyi nga na swiphemuphemu: ntshamiseko wo kongoma wo tiya (Theil-Sen); xirhendzevutani xa yona i nhlayo ya “hi khume ra malembe” eka ntsheketo.
  • p<0.05 / n.s.: Nkoka wa Mann-Kendall: loko ntshamiseko wu ri wa xiviri hi tlhelo ra tinhlayo kumbe wu nga va mpfumawulo ntsena (n.s. = a wu ri wa nkoka). Hi ntolovelo mahiselo yana ya nkoka swinene; mpfula hakanyingi a hi yona.
  • Shaded band: nxaxamelo wa matimu hinkwawo eka malembe hinkwawo ya nhweti yoleyo.
  • Mihlovo ya mepe wo hisa: mahiselo (ku titimela ka wasi → ku kufumela ko tshwuka); hlaya kholomo ku suka ehansi ku ya ehenhla ku hlalela n’hweti yoleyo yi cinca hi ku famba ka malembe.
threshold_title: Masiku yo hisa & yo titimela hi lembe, {name}
yearly_title: Mahiselo ya le xikarhi ya lembe na lembe kuya eka malembe, {name}.
yearly_ylabel: Mahiselo ya le xikarhi ya lembe na lembe (°C).
anomaly_title: Ku hambana ka mahiselo ya lembe na lembe, {name}.
heatmap_title: N’hweti na n’hweti ya mahiselo ya le xikarhi hi lembe, {name}.
anom_heatmap_title: Ku nga tolovelekangi ka n’hweti na n’hweti vs. {base}, {name}.
anom_heatmap_cbar: Ku nga tolovelekangi ku hambana na {base} (°C).
subtitle: {start}-{end} · {days} masiku · yo kufumela swinene {wy} ({wv:.1f} °C), yo titimela swinene {cy} ({cv:.1f} °C)
analog_line: Hi 2050, maxelo ya ndzhawu liya yanga titwa kufana na {analog} namuntlha, kwalomu ka +{d} °C ya kufumela.
analog_past: Hi 1940, maxelo ya ndzhawu liya ya titwa kufana na {analog} namuntlha, kwalomu ka {d} °C ya kufumela.
cap_yearly: Xiringaniso xa lembe na lembe lexi nga na LOESS smoother (xi kombisa ku hatlisa) na Theil-Sen trend yo tiya +nkoka
cap_anomalies: Lembe na lembe loko ku pimanisiwa na xiringaniso xa 1961-1990: ti bars to tshwuka ta kufumela, ta blue cooler. Ku cinca kusuka eka ngopfu ngopfu ya wasi kuya eka yotshuka ngopfu i ku kufumela.
cap_heatmap: Xiringaniso xa nhweti yin’wana na yin’wana eka lembe rin’wana na rin’wana tani hi grid ya mihlovo (2 °C bands). Hlaya kholomo ehenhla leswaku u hlalela n’hweti yoleyo yi kufumela eka makume ya malembe.
cap_anom_heatmap: Gridi yin’we, kambe nhweti yin’wana na yin’wana yi pimiwa kuya hi ntolovelo wa yona wa 1961-1990, kutani ntsena ku cinca loku kombisaka (ku kufumela ko tshwuka kutlula ntolovelo, ku kufumela ka wasi), xirhendzevutani xa tinguva xi susiwile.
cap_threshold: Masiku lembe na lembe yale henhla ka 18 °C (ku hisa) nale hansi ka 0 °C (freezing). Mikhuva yimbirhi leyi tiyeke leyi tsemakanyaka swivula leswaku masiku yo hisa sweswi ya tlula masiku yo titimela.
hint: Click anywhere kutani u cinca Esc ku pfala
site_title: Ku hisa ka madoroba ya misava
intro: Ndlela leyi madoroba lamakulu ya misava ya kufumelaka ha yona ku sukela hi 1940: tirhekhodo ta mahiselo ya siku na siku ku suka eka nxopaxopo wa maxelo wa ERA5.
map_sub: Hlawula doroba emepeni kumbe eka nxaxamelo
omni_ph: Secha doroba, tiko, xifundzha kumbe ndhawu yihi na yihi
range_title: Ku hisa ka n’hweti na n’hweti eka malembe hinkwawo, {name}.
range_ylabel: Mahiselo ya le xikarhi ya n’hweti na n’hweti (°C).
cap_range: N’hweti yin’wana na yin’wana ya min-max range eka malembe, na lembe ra sweswinyana. Xana i ku angarha tlhelo leri kufumelaka?
record_title: Rhekhodo ya n’hweti na n’hweti ya mahiselo ya le henhla/ya le hansi ya siku na siku, {name}.
record_ylabel: Ku hisa ka siku na siku (°C).
cap_records: N’hweti yin’wana ni yin’wana rhekhodo ya nkarhi hinkwawo ya siku na siku ya le henhla ni ya le hansi, na ku hundzeleta ka lembe ra sweswinyana
volatility_title: Ku cinca-cinca ka mahiselo ya siku na siku hi lembe, {name}.
volatility_jump: ku tlula-tlula ka siku na siku
cap_volatility: I kangani ku tlula lokukulu ka mahiselo ya siku na siku ku humelela lembe na lembe (≥6 °C), ku cinca cinca ka mahiselo
precip_annual: nhlayo hinkwayo ya lembe na lembe
cap_precip: Mpfula hinkwayo ya lembe na lembe (mpfula na mati ya gamboko) na mukhuva
stripes_cbar: Ku nga tolovelekangi ku hambana na {lo}-{hi} (°C).
cap_stripes: Stripe yin’wana na yin’wana yina mahiselo ya lembe rin’we: ya wasi ya kufumela, yotshuka ya kufumela kutlula avhareji ya 1961-1990. Ku khuluka kusuka eka muhlovo wa wasi kuya eka wo tshwuka i ku kufumela, kungari na nchumu wo hlaya handle ka muvala.
season_title: Ku leha ka nguva yo kula, {name}.
season_ylabel: Ku leha ka nguva yo kula (masiku).
cap_season: Ku leha ka nguva ya kukula hiku hisa lembe na lembe (run of days with a daily mean ≥ 5 °C): vurimi bya mafasitere lebyingariki na xirhami swiya hi, ku leha loko maxelo ya kufumela.
dtr_title: Nhlayo ya mahiselo ya siku (siku − vusiku), {name}.
dtr_ylabel: Xiringaniso xa siku na siku max − min (°C).
cap_dtr: Xivandla xa xikarhi exikarhi ka siku rin’wana ni rin’wana ra le henhla ni ra le hansi. Ndzhawu leyi hungutaka i xikombiso xa tintiho xa greenhouse: vusiku byi kufumela hiku hatlisa kutlula masiku; leyi andzisaka yi nga kombisa ku oma.
seasonshift_title: Ndlela leyi xirhendzevutani xa tinguva xi cinceke ha yona, {name}.
seasonshift_ylabel: Mahiselo ya le xikarhi ya n’hweti na n’hweti (°C).
cap_seasonshift: Lembe ra xikarhi ra ro sungula vs. khume ra malembe yo hetelela ya rhekhodo. Xivandla exikarhi ka ti curves eka nhweti yin’wana na yin’wana xikombisa leswaku hi swihi swiphemu swa lembe leswi kufumelaka ngopfu (hakanyingi xixika kutlula ximumu).
health_sub: Ndlela leyi mikhuva ya ku kufumela leyi nga laha henhla yi hundzuluxelaka ha yona eka timetriki leti tiviwaka ta ku hlangana na ku hisa, ku titimela na swiendlakalo swo tlula mpimo. Chati yin’wana na yin’wana yi humelela laha datha leyi yi yi lavaka yi kumekaka kona.
cap_degreedays: Ndzhwalo wa lembe na lembe wa thermal-comfort: xilaveko xo kufumeta (ehansi ka 18 °C) xiwa loko xilaveko xo kufumeta (ehenhla ka 22 °C) xi tlakuka, proxy ya ku hlangana na xirhami xikan’we na xilaveko xa air-conditioning.
heatwave_title: Masiku ya ku hisa hi lembe, {name}.
heatwave_ylabel: Masiku ya ku hisa hi lembe
cap_heatwave: Masiku eka kuhisa: ku tsutsuma ka ≥3 wa masiku na xiyimo xale henhla xa siku na siku ehenhla ka ndzhawu ya 1961-1990 90th percentile. Ku hisa loku nga heriki ka siku i xivangelo lexikulu xa ku fa loku tlulaka mpimo hi magandlati yo hisa.
tropic_title: Vusiku bya le tindhawini to hisa hi lembe, {name}.
cap_tropic: Vusiku loko low yitshama eka kumbe ehenhla ka 20 °C, kutani miri awu kumi ku wisa vusiku byin’we, muchayeri loyi a rhangelaka, loyi hakanyingi a honisiwaka wa rifu leri fambelanaka na kuhisa.
cap_coldspell: Masiku eka nkarhi wo titimela: ku tsutsuma ka ≥3 wa masiku na xiyimo xale hansi xa siku na siku ehansi ka ndzhawu ya 1961-1990 10th percentile. Ku titimela loku tekeke nkarhi wo leha ku susumeta mafu lama tlulaka mpimo ya misiha ya mbilu ni ya ku hefemula hi xixika.
heavyrain_title: Masiku ya mpfula ya matimba hi lembe, {name}
cap_heavyrain: Masiku lawa yanga na mpfula ya kwalomu ka 20 mm (ETCCDI R20mm), timpfula leti hlohlotelaka ndhambi leti tisaka ku vaviseka, ku rhurha na mavabyi lawa ya tluletiwaka hi mati.
heatindex_title: Masiku ya khombo ya heat-index hi lembe, {name}.
cap_heatindex: Masiku mahiselo lawa ya vonakaka (heat index, leyi peta eka humidity) yafika eka ti heat-stress levels, metric public heat advisories yitirhisa. Swi lava dataset ya mahiselo lama vonakaka.
footer: Ku endliwile {date} · datha ku suka eka Open-Meteo nxopaxopo wa matimu nakambe (ERA5) · xihlovo eka GitHub
